meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: User gives a vague animation request like 'animate this landing page' or 'make it feel premium.'
scenarios.orientation: Stop and generate a brief. Ask clarifying questions about audience, attention path, and emotional tone. Do not write code until the brief is approved.

scenarios.trigger: Agent-generated animation looks busy, cheap, or AI-like.
scenarios.orientation: Check if the agent skipped the brief step. Reduce moving groups, add holds, slow easing, and remove decorative effects. Re-review against motion_design_master criteria.

scenarios.trigger: User wants to iterate on agent-generated animation.
scenarios.orientation: Show the current animation. Ask the human to mark each beat: keep / adjust / replace. Apply changes and show a revision delta listing what changed and why.

scenarios.trigger: Team wants to establish an AI-assisted animation pipeline.
scenarios.orientation: Define the brief template, assumption log format, review gate checkpoints, and quality criteria. Document the workflow. Run a pilot with one animation before scaling.
